violations.text: The food prep sink in the kitchen is equipped with an air break. An air gap is required. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

The service entrance doors, located in the rear, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
